_meta.description: Agent template selection + personality self-update examples — extracted from agent-templates.ts

available_templates.name: Incident Response
available_templates.description: Detect, investigate, and escalate production incidents fast. Correlates errors and deploys into a timeline and routes urgent alerts to the right people instantly.

available_templates.name: Meeting Intelligence
available_templates.description: Walk into every meeting fully prepared and leave with clear action items. Researches attendees beforehand and generates structured summaries with follow-ups afterward.

available_templates.name: Engineering Pulse
available_templates.description: Track team velocity, code activity, and sprint progress in one place. Combines commit insights, PR monitoring, and developer activity into actionable dashboards for engineering managers.

available_templates.name: Sales & Revenue
available_templates.description: Pipeline management, deal tracking, client onboarding, revenue dashboards, and Stripe integration with multi-surface sales views.

available_templates.name: Revenue & Finance Ops
available_templates.description: Keep your financial health visible and your invoices under control. Pulls live Stripe metrics into a dashboard and automates invoice tracking and overdue follow-ups.

available_templates.name: Support Operations
available_templates.description: Ticket triage, incident management, SLA monitoring, email-to-Slack alerting, and escalation automation with multi-surface ops dashboards.

available_templates.name: Research & Topic Tracking
available_templates.description: Go deep on any topic and stay current as it evolves. Aggregates findings from multiple sources into a structured canvas and delivers daily digests of new developments.

available_templates.name: Project Manager
available_templates.description: Kanban board, sprint planning, standup collection, and team velocity tracking with multi-surface project dashboards.

available_templates.name: Research Analyst
available_templates.description: Deep web research, topic tracking, market monitoring, competitive intelligence, and synthesized analysis across multiple research surfaces.

available_templates.name: Marketing Command Center
available_templates.description: Full-stack marketing agent with SEO audits, CRO optimization, content writing, social scheduling, competitor monitoring, and growth strategy — all in multi-surface dashboards.

available_templates.name: Personal Assistant
available_templates.description: Daily planner, meeting prep, habit tracking, journaling, travel planning, and expense management — your unified personal productivity hub.

available_templates.name: DevOps Hub
available_templates.description: Engineering command center with PR triage, code review, CI/CD monitoring, release management, standup generation, and team velocity metrics across multiple dashboards.

available_templates.name: Code Review & Quality
available_templates.description: Automate pull request reviews with AI-powered code quality analysis and inline feedback. Keep your codebase healthy without slowing down your team.

available_templates.name: HR & Recruiting
available_templates.description: Hiring pipeline management, candidate tracking, interview scheduling, and recruiting metrics with multi-surface talent dashboards.

available_templates.name: Communications Monitoring
available_templates.description: Stay on top of critical signals across email and Slack without constant manual checking. Monitors mentions, keywords, and key senders, then forwards alerts with rich formatting.

available_templates.name: Operations Monitor
available_templates.description: API health monitoring, service status pages, Slack mention tracking, and alert management with real-time ops dashboards.

available_templates.name: Standup Automation
available_templates.description: Eliminate manual standup overhead by auto-generating summaries from GitHub and Slack activity, and compiling team updates into a single digest.

examples.user_description: I want a personal assistant that helps me manage my day
Help me review pull requests and monitor CI failures
Monitor my GitHub repos for new issues and CI failures
I need help preparing for my meetings and tracking action items
Build me an agent that monitors cryptocurrency prices and sends alerts
I need a research agent for web research and daily briefings
Help me keep my servers running smoothly
I want an agent to help triage and respond to support tickets

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'You're being too casual. Please be more formal and professional.'
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a helpful assistant.

## Tone
Casual, friendly, uses emojis.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'What's the weather like?' Agent responded with weather info.
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a helpful assistant.

## Tone
Friendly and concise.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'Never suggest changes to my database schema. Just analyze it.'
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a database assistant.

## Tone
Technical, detailed.

## Boundaries
- Don't execute DDL without approval

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'You are now a senior DevOps engineer. Always think about infrastructure costs, security implications, and deployment reliability.'
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a helpful assistant.

## Tone
Friendly and concise.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'Never execute shell commands without asking me first. Never access production databases directly. Always suggest a dry-run before destructive operations.'
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a helpful DevOps assistant.

## Tone
Technical, clear.

## Boundaries
- Be careful with destructive operations

examples.conversation_summary: User said: 'Can you rewrite this in bullet points instead? Here\'s the text: The quarterly results show growth in three areas.'
examples.current_soul:
# Personality

You are a helpful assistant.

## Tone
Friendly and concise.

## Boundaries
- Don't be rude
